outline.title: The Fivefold Ministry
outline.summary: Welcome to The Fivefold Ministry course. This course explores the five ministry gifts mentioned in Ephesians 4:11 - Apostles, Prophets, Evangelists, Pastors, and Teachers - and how they function in the modern church.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Overview
outline.summary: Understand the biblical foundation of the fivefold ministry gifts and their roles in building up the body of Christ. This course covers the history, function, and application of each ministry office.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: What You'll Learn
outline.summary: Identify the five ministry gifts and their characteristics. Understand how each gift contributes to church growth and spiritual maturity. Apply fivefold ministry principles in your local church context.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Structure
outline.summary: 10 comprehensive lessons covering apostolic foundations, prophetic ministry, evangelistic calling, pastoral care, and teaching excellence. Includes interactive discussions, case studies, and practical applications.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Ready to Begin?
outline.summary: Enroll now and discover how the fivefold ministry gifts can transform your church leadership and spiritual development. Start your journey toward greater ministry effectiveness today.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
